channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Gujarat CM urges calm amid international tensions and highlights BJP’s national ideology
item.description: On April 6, 2026, Gujarat Chief Minister Bhupendra Patel addressed party workers at the Bharatiya Janata Party's 47th Foundation Day celebrations in Gandhinagar. Mr. Patel stressed the BJP’s commitmen...

item.title: Four people die in two separate taxi crashes in Mpumalanga
item.description: In a tragic day on Mpumalanga roads, four people lost their lives in two separate minibus taxi accidents on Monday. The first incident occurred on the N2 between eMkhondo and Ermelo, where a head-on c...

item.title: PTCL’s new fibre optic rollout links landline service to internet bundles in Karachi
item.description: Pakistan Telecommunications Company Limited (PTCL) has started replacing its old copper wire network in Karachi with new fibre optic cables, introducing major changes to its landline system. Many resi...

item.title: Celebrity Easter Celebrations: A Ranking from High-End to High Street
item.description: A recent article has ranked various celebrity Easter celebrations, offering a lighthearted assessment of their extravagance and style. The rankings span a spectrum from overly ostentatious displays to...

item.title: UK Sees Significant Increase in Ebike and E-Scooter Fires Amid Battery Safety Concerns
item.description: The UK experienced a record rise in fires involving electric bicycles (ebikes) and e-scooters in 2025, with at least 432 ebike fires and 147 e-scooter fires recorded. This represents a 38% increase fo...

item.title: NASA’s Artemis II Crew Reaches Record Distance from Earth During Lunar Flyby
item.description: NASA’s Artemis II mission has set a new milestone in human space exploration by surpassing the previous record for distance from Earth held by Apollo 13 in 1970. On April 6, 2026, astronauts Reid Wise...

item.title: Hungary Elections: Corruption Allegations Threaten Orban's Long Rule
item.description: Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orbán is facing a serious challenge as he seeks re-election in the upcoming April 12th vote, with widespread allegations of corruption plaguing his inner circle. While ...

item.title: Finmec Grows Strongly in Port Hedland, Thriving Despite Economic Fluctuations
item.description: Finmec, a mining-related business based in Western Australia, has successfully navigated the region's fluctuating economy to emerge as a robust and growing company. By strategically capitalizing on op...

item.title: Punjab Traders Demand Equal Implementation of 8pm Closure Timings for Cantts and DHA
item.description: Traders from across Punjab are urging the federal and provincial governments to ensure that the decision to close markets, shopping malls, and bazaars at 8pm is applied uniformly throughout the provin...

item.title: American woman reported missing after falling overboard from dinghy in the Bahamas
item.description: An American woman is missing after she fell overboard from a small dinghy during an evening trip with her husband in the Bahamas on Saturday evening. The couple were travelling the approximately 2.5-m...

item.title: Alberta farmers see improved field conditions despite late spring snow
item.description: A late-season winter storm is set to bring snow to parts of Alberta, including Edmonton and areas north of the city, starting Monday and lasting through Wednesday. Snowfall is expected to be heaviest ...

item.title: Sindh Government Introduces Online Portal for Monthly Rs2,000 Bike Fuel Subsidy
item.description: In Karachi, Chief Minister Syed Murad Ali Shah announced an online registration and verification system for motorcycle owners to receive a targeted fuel subsidy of Rs2,000 per month. Citizens can now ...

item.title: Abiriba Community Shows Strong Support for Governor Otti Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: The people of Abiriba Enachioken don show full support for Abia State Governor, Alex Otti, as the 2027 elections dey approach. Dem community leaders, led by Leslie Ebueme Ezikpe, visit Governor Otti f...

item.title: SARS Clamps Down on Influencers: Tracking Perks as Taxable Income
item.description: For years, South African influencers operated in a largely unregulated space, receiving perks like free products and all-expenses-paid trips, which they often didn’t consider as taxable income. Howeve...

item.title: Jammu Youth Dies After Being Misled Into Russian Military Conflict
item.description: A tragic incident occurred involving a 23-year-old man from Jammu, Sachin Khajuria, who was deceived by job offers in Russia and later found to have been killed in the Russia-Ukraine war. In August 20...

item.title: Trump’s Escalating Threats Against Iran and Pakistan’s Role in Mediation
item.description: US President Donald Trump has once again escalated tensions with Iran by reiterating his threats of severe military action. Speaking at a White House news conference, he warned that Iran could be 'tak...

item.title: The Impact of Film Personalities on Tamil Nadu’s Political and Social Landscape
item.description: Jayakanthan’s novella *Cinemavukku Pona Chitthalu* explores the powerful influence of cinema on social identity and political consciousness in Tamil Nadu. Set in Chennai, the story revolves around Kam...

item.title: Iran’s Warnings Against US Tech Firms, Trump’s Election Strategies, and Polymarket’s Failed Pop-up Event
item.description: The latest episode of WIRED’s 'Uncanny Valley' podcast delves into three major topics shaping current global and domestic affairs. The hosts discuss Iran’s recent threats to attack major US technology...

item.title: Johannesburg man drowns in Gonubie River during outing with friends
item.description: On Sunday afternoon, a 30-year-old man from Johannesburg tragically drowned in the Gonubie River in KuGompo City. The incident occurred when he and two friends, all colleagues, were visiting the river...

item.title: Mechanical and Weather Problems Disrupt BC Ferries Service Across Major Routes
item.description: BC Ferries has cancelled multiple sailings on major routes connecting the British Columbia mainland and Vancouver Island due to a combination of mechanical issues and deteriorating weather conditions....
